hero.description: VIETNAM DIAMOND & ZEBRA ELECTRIC CO., LTD. is a subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan), specializing in the manufacturing of high-quality precision transformers for global markets.

overview.label: Company Overview
overview.title: A World-Class Transformer Manufacturer in Vietnam
overview.desc_1: Vietnam Diamond & Zebra Electric Co., Ltd. (ZVE) operates a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility located in Dai Dong-Hoan Son Industrial Park, Bac Ninh, Vietnam. With a team of more than 600 engineers, technicians and skilled labors, we specialize in the design and production of power transformers, distribution transformers, instrument transformers, and customized transformer solutions for utilities, industrial clients, and OEM clients across Asia and global markets.
overview.desc_2: As a wholly owned subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (Japan), ZVE combines Japanese engineering excellence with Vietnam’s manufacturing flexibility and efficiency — delivering premium-quality products, reliable performance, and competitive lead times to clients worldwide.

items.title: Tabuchi Group founded in Osaka, Japan
items.desc:
Key Operations & Products
Energy Solutions: Manufactures residential and business solar inverters, hybrid solar inverter & storage battery systems, and remote monitoring services (TABUCHI-cloud)
Electronics & Transformers: Designs and produces high-voltage transformers, power devices, and industrial power supplies.
Automotive: Develops on-board chargers, DC-DC converters, and ignition coils

items.title: Diamond Electric Group founded in Osaka, Japan
items.desc:
Key Operations & Products
 Automotive: Specializes in global manufacturing of advanced ignition coils, engine control systems, and multi-spark ignition technologies for major automakers.
On-board Power Electronics: Develops and supplies automotive on-board chargers (OBC), DC-DC converters, and power control units for electric and hybrid vehicles (EV/HV).Electronic Control
Devices: Designs and produces electronic control boards, ignition units for home water heaters, and climate control systems.

items.title: Vietnam Tabuchi Electric Co. Ltd, established in Bac Ninh Province, Vietnam
items.desc:
Production Focus
 The plant focused on high-efficiency, customized high-frequency electrical transformers and electronic components destined for worldwide export.

items.title: Diamond Electric Vietnam founded in Hanoi City, Vietnam
items.desc:
Core objective
 Research and Development (R&D) Center. It focused on hiring local engineers to develop embedded software, electronic control circuits, and advanced power electronics.

items.title: Tabuchi Electric group and Diamond Electric group merged
Vietnam Tabuchi Electric changed name to Vietnam Diamond & Zebra Electric
Diamond Electric Vietnam became branch of Vietnam Diamond & Zebra Electric
Japanese Quality Spirit
items.desc: Rooted in Kaizen philosophy — continuous improvement, zero defects, and absolute accountability in every product we deliver.

items.title: Customer Commitment
items.desc: We treat every client requirement as a precise engineering challenge — delivering on time, on spec, and beyond expectation.

items.title: Innovation & R&D
items.desc: Investing continuously in new technologies and smart manufacturing to push the boundaries of transformer design.

items.title: Team & Partnership
items.desc: A culture of collaboration — our engineers, partners, and clients work as one team toward shared success.

items.title: Environmental Responsibility
items.desc: Designing energy-efficient transformers that reduce losses and contribute to a sustainable, low-carbon future.

items.title: Precision Engineering
items.desc: Every winding, every core, every test — performed to exacting tolerances that define the ZVE standard.

hanoi.label: About · Hanoi Branch
hanoi.desc: Our Hanoi Branch undertakes projects and works directly with engineers from Japan. Simultaneously, we receive support projects to increase the efficiency of the factory in Bac Ninh.
hanoi.feature_1_desc: Direct point of contact for specifications, and project coordination.
hanoi.feature_2_desc: Our team of engineers is responsible for product development, installation guidance, warranty services, product upgrades, and other client requirements.

group.label: Corporate Group
group.title: Part of Diamond Electric Holdings
group.desc: ZVE is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Diamond Electric Holdings Co., Ltd. (DEHD) with 80+ years of heritage and operations in 15+ countries.

cta.title: Ready to grow your business with ZVE?
cta.desc: Send us your technical requirements and get a response within 24 hours.

hero.title:
Build the future
with us
hero.desc: We are looking for passionate individuals who are not afraid of challenges and want to create products with real impact

stable.title: Stable Working Environment
stable.desc: We provide a stable and well-structured working environment with clear processes and long-term orientation.

career.title: Long-term Career Development
career.desc: Employees are supported to develop their skills and build a sustainable career path within the company.

respect.title: Respectful Workplace
respect.desc: We value mutual respect, responsibility, and professionalism in daily work.

performance.title: Performance-based Evaluation
performance.desc: Salary and bonuses are reviewed based on individual performance and contribution.

activities.title: Company Activities
activities.desc: Annual events and internal activities are organized to strengthen team cohesion.

international.title: International Collaboration
international.desc: Opportunities to work with Japanese clients and follow international standards.

application.title: Application Submission
application.desc: Interested candidates are invited to submit CV to the email address hr@dia-zbr.com.vn. We will contact qualified candidates for the next steps.

hr.title: HR Interview
hr.desc: We will conduct a 30-minute phone interview to better understand you, your expectations, and your fit with our company culture.

test.title: 1st round Interview
test.desc: We will arrange an in-depth interview with the Department Manager to evaluate the candidate's professional expertise, experience, and problem-solving skills.

interview.title: 2nd round Interview
interview.desc: Qualified candidates will proceed to the final round with our General Director to discuss long-term orientation, vision, and cultural fit.

offer.title: Offer & Onboarding
offer.desc: We will send an official job offer to the successful candidate within 1 week. Welcome to our team!

products_preview.label: Our Products
products_preview.title: Transformer Solutions
products_preview.desc: From power supply component for home and office electrical equipment to automotive, we deliver quality parts that meet the highest industry standards.

overview.label: Branch of Diamond & Zebra Electric Vietnam Company Limited in Hanoi City
overview.desc: Branch of Diamond & Zebra Electric Vietnam Company Limited in Hanoi City, located on M Floor, TTC Tower, 19 Duy Tan, Cau Giay, Hanoi serves as a collaborative workspace for engineering software and hardware, project management, and client support across Japan and Vietnam.

capabilities.label: CORE CAPABILITIES
capabilities.title: What We Do
capabilities.desc: Delivering innovative power electronics, embedded systems, and software solutions for a smarter future.​

energy.title: Energy Solutions
energy.subtitle: Our Energy Solutions Engineering team delivers advanced power and renewable energy solutions through innovative design, automation, and system integration, helping clients reduce costs and achieve sustainable growth.

items.name: Battery Management System
items.desc: Provides optimal performance solutions, ensuring absolute safety and extending the sustainable lifespan of your battery.

items.name: Power Conditioner
items.desc: Is an energy storage system that captures solar power, stores it in batteries, and converts it into AC electricity to provide reliable power for users whenever needed.

manufacturing.title: Application Development
manufacturing.subtitle: Creating innovative applications that provide seamless user experiences and real business value.​

items.name: Block Diagram Builder
items.desc: Is a tool used to draw block diagrams professionally, allowing users to unleash their creativity with their ideas.

items.name: Component Management
items.desc: Digitizes inventory management by tracking component quantities, stock movements, and low-stock alerts in real time.

items.name: Task Manager
items.desc: Is a project management platform that enables task assignment, progress tracking, and overdue task monitoring to improve team productivity and project visibility.

global.title: Embedded Software Design
global.subtitle: Specializing in the design and development of Advanced Embedded Software, we transform complex ideas into the most intelligent and reliable products.

items.name: Inverter
items.desc: Is a power conversion system that converts AC power to DC for EV charging and supports bidirectional energy flow between the grid and battery.

items.name: DC-DC Converter
items.desc: Converts high-voltage DC from the EV battery pack into regulated 12V DC power.​

items.name: Signal Converter
items.desc: Transforms input signals into configurable output signals using configurable parameters received via CAN communication.​

items.name: Simulation Board
items.desc: Is a CAN-enabled testing platform that monitors input signals on a PC and generates configurable output signals based on user commands.

electronic.title: Circuit Design
electronic.subtitle: Our team of experts designs and optimizes circuit boards, transforming technological ideas into practical, durable, and high-performance hardware solutions.

items.name: Inverter Circuit Design
items.desc: Develops the power, control, and protection circuits required for efficient bidirectional energy conversion in EV charging systems.

items.name: DC-DC Converter Circuit Design
items.desc: Focuses on developing high-efficiency power electronics circuits that convert a high-voltage DC from the traction battery into regulated 12V DC for auxiliary systems and battery charging.

items.name: Signal Converter Circuit Design
items.desc: Develops configurable signal conditioning and conversion circuits that process input signals and generate required outputs based on parameters received via CAN communication.

equipment.label: OFFICE FACILITIES
equipment.title: Friendly
equipment.desc: Our office is equipped with high-performance engineering workstations, advanced electronic testing laboratories, and dedicated research & development facilities. These resources enable us to create innovative software and hardware solutions that deliver exceptional performance, reliability, and value to our clients.​

workstations.label: High-Performance Workstations​
workstations.desc: Advanced work tools, in line with market trends​

dashboard.label: New generation test kits​
dashboard.desc: Ready-to-use boards are always updated according to market demands​

cta.title: Ready to collaborate?
cta.desc: Connect with our engineering team for technical inquiries, partnership opportunities, or product information.

tabs.by_president: by YuuRi Ono, President and CEO

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content:
We Are Diverse Shiny Diamonds.
We Are Seeking the Happiness of Our Comrades*,
By Supporting Our Customers First,
By Contributing to Society,
With the Commitment to Earn Their Trust.
mission.footnote: * I intentionally call employees Comrades as they are far more than colleagues or teammates: we have overcome fierce struggles against all odds in the past and now fight for a bright future, powered by our Scrum of Fire, a symbol of burning passion binding us as one.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Contribute to the Improvement of Global Environment by Connecting Cars and Homes with Manufacturing

policies.title: President's Three Major Policies
policies.content:
1. Meet Customer Quality Standards.
2. Reduce Costs.
3. Promote Positive Work Environment.

quality.title: Quality Policy
quality.content:
We Keep on Providing Peace of Mind,
Safety and Excitement to the World 
 by Striving to Meet the High Standards of 
 Our World-Class Customers in Manufacturing.

manufacturing.title: President’s Manufacturing Policy
manufacturing.content:
GENBA, GENBA, GENBA
Do Stand in Their Shoes,
 Really Do.

humanrights.title: Declaration of Multifaceted Human Rights
humanrights.content:
We, All Diamonds, respect all kinds of blood, color, body, origin, tribe, gender, age, belief or religion.

We never accept any kind of discrimination, never allow people discriminate against the weak.

We maintain fair and green trades, never include any kind of discrimination, to serve the public interest.

customers.label: Our Clients
customers.title: Trusted by Our Valued Clients
customers.desc: We are proud to collaborate with a wide range of trusted clients who rely on our quality, reliability, and commitment to excellence. Through close partnerships and continuous innovation, we strive to understand each client's unique needs and deliver solutions that create lasting value. Our dedication to high standards and long-term relationships enables us to consistently exceed expectations and build trust across every collaboration.

transformer.label: Transformer
transformer.summary: High-efficiency magnetic energy transfer for power conversion and isolation.

features.title: Isolation Transformers
features.desc: Galvanic isolation between primary and secondary windings for safety and noise suppression.

features.title: Switching Transformers
features.desc: Optimized for high-frequency SMPS applications with low core loss and precise inductance.

features.title: Pulse Transformers
features.desc: Fast rise-time signal coupling for gate drive and digital isolation circuits.

features.title: Planar Transformers
features.desc: Ultra-low profile PCB-mounted design for space-critical power modules.

features.title: 3FL Switch Mode Transformer
features.desc: With Diamond & Zebra's patented technology on bobbin structure, possible to reduce the size, and its dimension down by approximately 30% from the ordinary structure. Diamond & Zebra's 3FL series bobbin structure has a small groove on the pin-block in order to secure enough insulation distance (patended technology). By this technology, Diamond & Zebra's high-reliable and unique low-height structure becomes possible.

inductor.label: Inductor
inductor.summary: Surface mount & through-hole inductors for DC-DC converters and RF circuits.

features.title: SMD Power Inductors
features.desc: Shielded construction for low EMI in compact DC-DC converter designs up to 30A.

features.title: Multilayer Inductors
features.desc: Ceramic multilayer process achieving sub-nH tolerances for GHz-range RF circuits.

features.title: Wirewound Inductors
features.desc: High-Q wirewound construction for IF and impedance matching filter networks.

features.title: Variable Inductors
features.desc: Adjustable slug-tuned coils for precision circuit alignment and calibration.

coil.label: Coil
coil.summary: Precision wound coils for power delivery and signal conditioning.

features.title: Power Choke Coils
features.desc: High-current inductors for DC-DC converters with excellent saturation characteristics.

features.title: RF Coils
features.desc: Air-core and ferrite-core designs tuned for radio frequency filtering and matching networks.

features.title: Toroidal Coils
features.desc: Low EMI radiation with closed magnetic path, ideal for audio and precision measurement.

features.title: Bobbin Coils
features.desc: Cost-effective wound assembly for relay, solenoid, and motor applications.

filter.label: Filter
filter.summary: EMI/EMC noise suppression solutions for industrial and automotive systems.

features.title: Common Mode Filters
features.desc: Suppress common-mode noise on power and signal lines in automotive and industrial systems.

features.title: EMI Line Filters
features.desc: Meets CISPR/EN 55032 Class B with combined differential and common mode attenuation.

features.title: LC Pi Filters
features.desc: Multi-stage LC networks for power entry filtering in harsh electromagnetic environments.

features.title: Feedthrough Filters
features.desc: Board-level filtering with direct chassis mounting for high-frequency interference rejection.

sensor.label: Sensor
sensor.summary: Current & position sensing technology with galvanic isolation.

features.title: Current Transformers
features.desc: Precision current sensing with wide bandwidth for energy metering and protection relays.

features.title: Rogowski Coils
features.desc: Flexible air-core design for non-intrusive AC current measurement in tight spaces.

features.title: Hall Effect Sensors
features.desc: Contactless DC/AC current sensing with galvanic isolation up to 3kV.

features.title: Magnetic Position Sensors
features.desc: Rotary and linear position detection for motor control and industrial automation.
